name: FX-Studio-AI
description: FX Studio AI - Plugin Marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: pipeline-orchestrator
plugins.description: Single-command multi-agent pipeline for Claude Code. Auto-classifies tasks, executes in adaptive batches with adversarial review, defense-in-depth gates, and proportional validation.

plugins.name: skill-advisor
plugins.description: Intelligent toolchain orchestrator for Claude Code - recommends skills, plugins, MCPs, and agents for any task with dependency-aware ordering

plugins.name: cc-toolkit
plugins.description: Claude Code Swiss Army Knife - diagnose, configure, and build your Claude Code environment. Meta-skill /cc with triage menu + 9 specialized skills.

plugins.name: html-artifacts
plugins.description: Generate self-contained HTML artifacts when output is too dense for markdown chat. v1.0.0 (2026-05-11): initial public release with 17 Thariq Shihipar templates (exploration, code review, design system, status, incident, flowchart, explainer, plan, PR writeup, triage, config editor, prompt tuner) + 4 trading-domain renderers (backtest-comparison, risk-dashboard, signal-audit, market-regime) + 3 spec renderers (Kiro requirements/design/tasks, auto-detected). Unified ArtifactEngine API with pydantic schemas. PostToolUse hook (portable via process.cwd + CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) regenerates companion HTML for edits in skills/rules/CLAUDE.md/knowledge_base/.kiro/specs. /gen-html slash command with 5 category flags. Interactive validation artifacts with clipboard response channel (=== ARTIFACT RESPONSE === block). Test suite: 10 files. MIT license + third-party attribution to Thariq (Anthropic Claude Code team).
